message:
feat(core): add 30 property-based tests for search daemon protocol/worker/client

Bead: ft-3i6bf

Property-based tests covering:
- Protocol round-trip serialization (12 tests)
- Worker determinism, sensitivity, dimension control (9 tests)
- Client transport errors, timeouts, loopback integration (6 tests)
- Server handle_encoded, shutdown behavior (3 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
